raw_top_k.preview: TASK: During FY26 planning, Keiko requested monthly retention anomaly snapshots for the Aurora growth cohort.
DECISION: Aurora retention snapshots are archived in monthly partitions to preserve two-year trend continuity.
RESEARCH: Legacy Aurora cohort notes mention churn around week-six onboarding for enterprise tenants.
TASK: Temporary parser fallback for Lumen migration was enabled only during cutover week.
DECISION: Vega rollback drills run every Tuesday and use a dedicated reliability namespace.

DECISION: Fixture IDs remain canonical labels even when server-generated IDs differ at runtime.
DECISION: Hermes read-side status responses may be partial while embedding readiness converges.
CONTEXT: Surreal-style record-shaped IDs may appear as object wrappers with nested String fields.
RESEARCH: Record-shaped ID normalization must extract stable String IDs from nested wrappers before ranking diagnostics.
